name: The Real Housewives Ultimate Girls Trip: Africa
original_name: The Real Housewives Ultimate Girls Trip: Africa
overview: For the first time, we’re bringing together iconic Housewives from across the continent to share their worlds, their stories and their sisterhood. It’s unapologetically Pan-African, women-led and full of the energy and authenticity that make Africa unlike anywhere else on Earth.

trailers.title: Touch down Rio | Ultimate Girls Trip Africa | Showmax Original
